title: The Search for Sunken Treasure
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo joins his family hunting a sunken ship's treasure, outwits greedy rivals, and finds aged cheese! 💎

q.en: What begins Geronimo's adventure in this book?
q.zh: 在书中，是什么开启了杰罗尼摩的冒险？

options.en: A phone call from Sally Ratmousen according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 莎莉·鼠莫森打来的电话（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A lavender-scented letter from Aunt Sweetfur
options.zh: 一封甜毛阿姨寄来的薰衣草香味信

explain.en: Geronimo finds a lavender letter on his desk from Aunt Sweetfur saying they must talk; she arrives that very day.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在桌上发现一封甜毛阿姨的薰衣草香味信，说有要事相谈；阿姨当天就到了。

q.en: What happened to Aunt Sweetfur's husband, Uncle Grayfur?
q.zh: 甜毛阿姨的丈夫灰毛叔叔遭遇了什么？

options.en: He was a seamouse who vanished at sea
options.zh: 他是一名水手鼠，在海上失踪了

options.en: He became a schoolteacher according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他当了一名老师（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Uncle Grayfur was a seamouse who sailed to the Ratlápagos Islands about twenty years earlier searching for a treasure and never returned.
explain.zh: 灰毛叔叔是一名水手鼠，大约二十年前乘船前往鼠加拉帕戈斯群岛寻找宝藏，此后再也没有回来。

q.en: What was the name of the sunken ship they were searching for?
q.zh: 他们寻找的沉船叫什么名字？

explain.en: Admiral Sea Snout's logbook names the lost ship as The Golden Rind, which sank in 1713 near Cream Cheese Island.
explain.zh: 海鼻海军上将的航海日志写明沉船叫“金橘号”，它于1713年沉没在奶油奶酪岛附近。

q.en: How many giant diamonds were in the ship's treasure chest?
q.zh: 沉船的宝藏箱里有多少颗巨大的钻石？

options.en: Thirty according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 三十颗（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The logbook says the cargo was a chest containing thirteen diamonds as big as a mouse's fist.
explain.zh: 航海日志记载，船上的货物是一只装着十三颗大如老鼠拳头钻石的箱子。

q.en: Who is the captain of the boat the family rents, the Queen Ratsy?
q.zh: 这家人租来的“鼠西女王号”船长是谁？

options.en: Milton Musclemouse according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 米尔顿·肌肉鼠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A suntanned rodent introduces himself as Scamper Skipper Paws, captain of the Queen Ratsy, ready to cast off.
explain.zh: 一位晒黑的老鼠自我介绍说是跳跃·船长·爪，也就是“鼠西女王号”的船长，准备起航。

q.en: What dish of Trap's burned Geronimo's mouth and killed his taste buds?
q.zh: 特拉普做的哪道菜烧坏了杰罗尼摩的嘴、让他尝不出味道？

options.en: Grilled cheese sandwiches according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 烤奶酪三明治（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Trap serves his Spicy Bean Bonanza made with three tons of red-hot chili peppers, and Geronimo's taste buds go numb.
explain.zh: 特拉普端出用三吨红辣椒做的“辣味豆大餐”，杰罗尼摩的味蕾直接麻得没知觉了。

q.en: What does Benjamin spot through his binoculars near Cream Cheese Island?
q.zh: 本杰明在奶油奶酪岛附近透过望远镜发现了什么？

options.en: A gold doubloon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一枚金币（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Benjamin cries out that he sees the claw-shaped rock, the exact spot where Admiral Sea Snout's ship hit and sank.
explain.zh: 本杰明大喊自己看到了那只爪形岩石，正是海鼻海军上将的船撞沉的地点。

q.en: Who are the two greedy rodents that try to steal the treasure?
q.zh: 企图抢走宝藏的两个贪婪老鼠是谁？

options.en: Benjamin and Skipper according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 本杰明和船长（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The villains are Greedy Whiskers (called 'The Whisk') and his associate Heartless Hairball ('Hairy'), who arrive on The Dirty Rotten Rodent.
explain.zh: 反派是贪婪胡须（外号“胡须”）和他的同伙无情毛球（外号“毛球”），他们乘着“肮脏坏老鼠号”出现。

q.en: What is really inside the mysterious cheese-colored amphora?
q.zh: 那个神秘的奶酪色双耳陶罐里究竟装着什么？

options.en: Sour pickles according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 酸泡菜（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Trap opens the amphora and finds first-rate Parmesan cheese matured for more than two centuries — the real treasure.
explain.zh: 特拉普打开陶罐，发现是窖藏了两百多年的顶级帕尔马干酪——这才是真正的宝藏。

q.en: On the way home, what does the family discover that is not on any map?
q.zh: 在回家的路上，这家人发现了什么地图上没有的东西？

options.en: A sunken city according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座沉没的城市（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A tiny island not on the map
options.zh: 一座地图上没有的小岛

explain.en: Far in the distance they spot a teeny-tiny island with palm trees and a waterfall that is not on their map, so they name themselves its discoverers.
explain.zh: 他们在远处发现一座长着棕榈树和瀑布、地图上没有的小岛，于是自认是它的发现者。
